creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to bsd from comment #2)
> All ports, main, slave and metaport for plugins were
> fully tested for build with both GTK2 and GTK3 option.
Oh. Good.

> Do you see a problem anywhere?
No I do not -- LGTM :-)
But as a maintainer, I am required to test, or otherwise
*prove* it works as intended. Uncommiting a commit, or
committing twice to make a correction, is considered
wasted effort(s). I don't make the rules. I just try to
follow them whenever possible. ;-)

--chris
